vllm.title: [Core] Combine async postprocessor and multi-step
vllm.author: alexm-redhat
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This PR combines async postprocessor with the multi-step execution. The key idea to run sampler pythonization + process_model_outputs of the previous step concurrently with the GPU forward pass (which avoid running a postprocessor at the end of the multi-step for all generated steps at once and bein

vllm.title: [Neuron] Adding support for context-lenght, token-gen buckets.
vllm.author: hbikki
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This change request helps us control the context length and token generation buckets using environment variables. Based on the environment variable, multiple XLA HLO graphs are compiled, and the closest XLA HLO graph is selected for latency optimization on the Neuron device, depending on the sequenc

vllm.title: support bitsandbytes 8-bit and FP4 quantized models
vllm.author: chenqianfzh
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR does the following:

support quantized bitsandbytes 8-bit models, such as meta-llama/Llama-Guard-3-8B-INT8
support quantized bitsandbytes 4-bit FP4 models, such as PrunaAI/Einstein-v6.1-Llama3-8B-bnb-4bit-smashed
Add comments about enforcing eager-mode in bnb quantization, as I identified it

vllm.title: Add more percentiles and latencies
vllm.author: wschin
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
99-precentile can be far away from median, average, and sometimes even 95-percentile. This PR adds more latency percentiles and end-to-end latency for profiling throughput.
Example usage (see --percentile-metrics and --metric-percentiles):
model_name="meta-llama/Meta-Llama-3.1-70B-Instruct"
python3

vllm.title: [VLM] Disallow overflowing `max_model_len` for multimodal models
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Currently, the placeholder tokens are silently truncated if they exceed the context length, causing confusing errors when later assigning multimodal features to the placeholder tokens inside the model. (e.g. #6176)
This PR avoids such problems by checking the length of the processed prompt beforehan

vllm.title: [Kernel] changing fused moe kernel chunk size default to 32k
vllm.author: avshalomman
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR changes the default value of VLLM_FUSED_MOE_CHUNK_SIZE from 64k to 32k, which lowers memory consumption during the forward pass.
We've measured the effects on kernel latency and found them to be minimal (see table below).
These numbers are for A100 80GB, we also tested on an H100 and found s

vllm.title: [MODEL] add Exaone model support
vllm.author: nayohan
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Recently, The new model exaone released. I  would love to contribute the new model to vLLM as well.

Paper: EXAONE 3.0 7.8B Instruction Tuned Language Model
HuggingFace: LGAI-EXAONE/EXAONE-3.0-7.8B-Instruct
Github: LG-AI-EXAONE/EXAONE-3.0

In this PR, I have provided the implementation of EXAONE-3.0
